long_description:

TIP Short Description: The Sysdig agent pod is Ready on node tok3-qz1-sr3-rk026-s12 in mzone2g7 but it is not exposing any metrics
TIP Console: toc
TIP Self Healing: true
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds: 4200
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:jp-tok::mzone2g7:pod:sysdig-agent-compute-8ghb6
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
